result:
All 30/30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `Main.scala`:

- **`status`** — prints staged files from index, or `(none)` if empty
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file/blob maps between two commits, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from commit blobs, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to target commit and clears index without touching working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index (errors if not staged)
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indent

A helper `parseCommitFiles` was added to parse the `files:` section of commit files into a `Map[String, String]`.
